channel.title: Programming on Stephan Bridger
channel.description: Recent content in Programming on Stephan Bridger

item.title: Bypassing Windows Defender
item.description:
Lately I’ve been poking around at Windows internals and writing low level code. This morning I thought I’d try to bypass Window’s Defender and try to get a low score on Virus Total.

One trick I’ve been playing with is writing shellcode to the Windows registry to keep things “fileless.” It’s not super fancy, but it’s kind of neat. I combined that with direct syscalls and some cryptographic routines to get Windows Defender to chill out.
